title: Close out epic 4bt: run epic retro, then flesh out epic o16 into ticks
description: Meta-work tick (orchestrator-owned). Standard close-out per SKILL.md Roadmaps section: run the epic-close retro (references/claude-runner.md), promote/record learnings in .tick/learnings.md, then read epic o16 (soft ordering surfaces: roadmap rendering in CLI/TUI/web + skill docs) rough scope and partition it into child ticks using the foundation-first procedure in references/tick-patterns.md. Create o16 meta-work ticks (final review + close-out) at planning time. Then close 4bt and continue with tk graph o16.
acceptance_criteria: retro run and learnings recorded per claude-runner.md; epic o16 partitioned into child ticks (including its own meta-work ticks); 4bt closed
